title: Bray's Better 3D Tools!
description: Make Tools and Weapons feel more interesting with a 3D spin!
body:
# Bray's 3D Tools!

![DiamondAxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ad66ea8b1839d2575f1674e3b6b906a7b166d95.jpeg)
**Add some spice to your tools and weapons by giving them a 3D spin that still fits into the vanilla feel of Minecraft!**

---

Note: Resource Pack is currently in Alpha and will be updated with time
